subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which were the capital cities of Rajasthan in the past?
explanation_en:
Ajmer was the capital of Rajasthan in the past, but the present-day capital is Jaipur.
Alwar was also a capital city of Rajasthan during different periods of its history.
explanation_hi:
राजस्थान के पूर्वागोष्ठ राजधानियाँ,
Ajmer राजस्थान के पूर्वागोष्ठ राजधानी बीजन, Ajmer और Alwar हैं।
राजस्थान में Alwar भी ही अन्यां के पूर्वागोष्ठी राजधानी, but the present-day capital is Jaipur.
राजस्थान में अब्दी राजधानी बीजन, Jaipur है।
explanation_en:
Alwar was a capital city of Rajasthan in the past, while Jaipur is the present-day capital.
Alwar was a prominent capital in Rajasthan's history, but Jaipur is the current capital.
explanation_hi: अलवर राजस्थान के पूर्वागोष्ठी राजधानी बीजन, अलवर है।
explanation_en:
Alwar was a prominent capital in Rajasthan's history but Jaipur is the current capital.
Alwar was an important capital city in the past, while Jaipur is the capital today.
explanation_hi: अलवर राजस्थान के पूर्वागोष्ठी राजधानी, अलवर है।
explanation_en:
Alwar was a significant capital in Rajasthan's past, while Jaipur is the current capital.
Alwar held importance as a capital city in Rajasthan's history, but Jaipur is the capital now.
explanation_hi: अलवर राजस्थान के पूर्वागोष्ठी राजधानी, अलवर है।
